title: Mats´s Guns and Stuff
description: A Mod That Adds 2 Guns And Ammo
body: A Gun Mod Made By Mats That Adds 2 Guns, A Glock And A AK47. The AK47 Shoots Constantly While Holding Right Click. The Glock Only Shoots If You Click Right Click Then Let Go, Every Time You Shoot It Gets Rid Of 1 Bullet From Your Inventory, If You Dont Have One It Doesnt Allow You To Shoot. Recipes Are In The Images
